name: claims_agent_insured_shared_bank
description: For every Claim in the graph, finds the writing agent of the claim's policy and checks whether any insured on that same policy shares a bank account with that agent. Returns a list of matches with (claim_id, policy_id, agent_id, insured_id, bank_account_id). Use when the question asks about insureds sharing a bank account with the writing agent of a claim's policy.

limit.description: Maximum number of result rows to return (default 200, max 1000).

name: claims_agent_insured_shared_phone
description: For every Claim in the graph, finds the writing agent of the claim's policy and checks whether any insured on that same policy shares a phone number with that agent. Returns a list of matches with (claim_id, policy_id, agent_id, insured_id, shared_phone). Use when the question asks about insureds sharing a phone number with the writing agent of a claim's policy.
